name: pr-genius
description: Evidence-backed PR contribution advisor MCP — local-only, read-only, OKF v0.1 compliant. Tells agents which PRs NOT to open, based on real accepted/rejected PR histories across 12+ large open-source projects.
longDescription:
pr-genius is a local-only, evidence-backed PR contribution advisor. It does NOT review code quality; instead it reviews contribution strategy (whether to open the PR at all).

Built from real accepted/rejected PR histories of zsxh1990 (~50 PRs across astral-sh/uv, plastic-labs/honcho, qdrant, e2b, fastmcp, harbor, agentic-community, mongodb-js, sourcebot, future-agi, NousResearch/hermes-agent, openclaw/openclaw).

Key features:
- 12+ repo profiles with maintainer vibe + AI policy + 17 agent_guidelines fields
- 15 ContribAI closed-PR anti-patterns (duplicate / out-of-scope / not-a-real-bug / etc.)
- 11 maintainer policies (MisakaNet + planned coverage of other repos)
- 226 coach cases with 83.2% accuracy (predicted vs actual merge outcomes)
- OKF v0.1 compliant knowledge bundle (Sudhakaran88/okf-conformance PASS)

Positioning (NOT what this MCP does):
- NOT a code reviewer (use CodeRabbit / Copilot for that)
- NOT an auto-PR bot (use ContribAI for that)
- NOT an issue triage (use Devin / Sweep for that)

What this MCP DOES:
- analyze_pr: structured signals + tier (low/medium/high) + checklist
- coach_pr: pass/fail (Agent PR Dojo)
- triage_pr: policy-aware verdict (pass/warn/reject/needs_preflight)
- get_repo_profile: org/name repo profile
- get_case_study: specific PR case study with rounds
- list_open_prs: tracked open PRs
- search_patterns: search anti-patterns + success-patterns
- schema_info: OKF schema versions + enum values

tools.name: analyze_pr
tools.description: Analyze a PR and return structured signals + improvement suggestions + 3-tier risk (low/medium/high)

tools.name: coach_pr
tools.description: Agent PR Dojo: pass/fail + checklist. pass=true means OK to submit.

tools.name: triage_pr
tools.description: Policy-aware PR triage. Returns verdict (pass/needs_preflight/warn/reject) + violations + recommended_action.

tools.name: get_repo_profile
tools.description: Return repo profile (org/name) with 17 agent_guidelines fields

tools.name: list_open_prs
tools.description: List all PR case studies with final_status=open

tools.name: get_case_study
tools.description: Return single PR case study (frontmatter + body) by repo + pr_number

tools.name: search_patterns
tools.description: Search anti-patterns + success-patterns by keyword (e.g. 'duplicate', 'missing tests')

tools.name: schema_info
tools.description: Return supported OKF schema versions + enum values
